link.description: The URL of the original article

title.description: A concise title conveying the key point of the article (in no more than 8 words)

tldr.description: A summary of 30 words or less, gisting the entire article

content.description: A bullet point style summary of the article, consisting of no more than 200 words

sentiment.description: A sentiment score for the article on a scale of 0 to 10, where 0 is very negative and 10 is very positive

tags.description: Up to 10 tags/keywords that capture the essence of the article

freedom.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Freedom

independence.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Independence

self-respect.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Self-Respect

self-actualization.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Self-Actualization

creativity.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Creativity

honesty.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Honesty

responsibility.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Responsibility

security.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Security

equality.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Equality

open-mindedness.description: Score indicating how closely related the article is to the value of Open-Mindedness
